blocks.text: Barcelona 7-2, Liverpool 4-0 — European royalty makes its statement

Barca dismantled Newcastle in historic fashion Wednesday, Liverpool roared past Galatasaray with Salah at his best. Tottenham are out — Sørloth's Atlético the executioners. Bodø/Glimt ended 5-0 in Lisbon.

blocks.label: ⚽ Sunday's must-watches
items: ⚽ Sun 13:00 — Sunderland vs Newcastle United — Tyne-Wear derby returns
⚽ Sun 14:00 — Barcelona vs Rayo Vallecano — Barça push for La Liga title
